characters.name: JÄNES SASSU
characters.description: Väike valge jänes, pehme koheva karvaga, suured ümarad roosaka sisuga kõrvad. Tal on seljas sinine soe sall. Suured sõbralikud silmad, uudishimulik ja leebe näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: ORAV OSSU
characters.description: Väike punakaspruun orav, pika koheva sabaga ja teravate kõrvatuttidega. Tal on peas roheline talvemüts. Säravad mustad silmad, rõõmsameelne naeratus ja energiline olek. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Elutuba
locations.description: Cozy living room with light blue painted walls, a warm wooden floor, and a large rectangular window on the back wall showing a gentle snowy landscape outside with bare trees. A small, simple wooden table is in the center of the room, with two small wooden chairs. A warm, flickering fireplace is on the left wall. The room is softly lit by ambient light, creating a peaceful atmosphere. Cartoon style.

locations.name: Lumeaed
locations.description: A serene snowy garden next to a charming, snow-covered house (Jänes Sassu's house) visible in the background. Deep, pristine white snow covers the ground and the branches of a few bare winter trees. The sky is a soft, muted grey, indicating a gentle winter day with no direct sun. The overall light is soft and ambient. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are standing side-by-side in front of a large window in a cozy living room. Sassu is slightly taller than Ossu. They are both looking out the window with thoughtful expressions. Outside, a gentle snowy landscape with bare trees is visible. The living room has light blue walls, a wooden floor, a small wooden table with chairs, and a fireplace. Warm, ambient light fills the room. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are still standing by the window in the cozy living room. Sassu points gently towards a small bird outside on a snowy branch with a concerned expression. Ossu looks out the window, observing the bird. The snowy landscape and bare trees are visible outside. The living room environment remains consistent with page 1. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are sitting at the small wooden table in the cozy living room. Sassu is holding a small piece of wood, and Ossu is holding a tiny pencil, looking at a simple drawing of a birdhouse on a piece of paper on the table. They both have determined and collaborative expressions. The fireplace is visible on the left wall, and the window shows snow outside. The room environment remains consistent. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are still at the small wooden table in the cozy living room. Sassu is carefully holding a larger, flat piece of wood. Ossu is handing a smaller piece of wood to Sassu. There are a few simple wooden shapes and a small blueprint on the table, indicating they are in the process of building. The room environment remains consistent. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu is carefully holding a tiny wooden hammer, gently tapping a small nail into a partially assembled wooden birdhouse on the small wooden table. Orav Ossu is watching intently, holding a small nail for Sassu. They are focused and careful. The fireplace and window are visible in the background. The room environment remains consistent. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are at the wooden table in the cozy living room. The small, finished wooden birdhouse is now standing on the table. Sassu is holding a small bag of bird seeds, and Ossu is carefully pouring a few seeds from the bag into the opening of the birdhouse. They both have satisfied and hopeful expressions. The room environment remains consistent. Cartoon style.

The scene is now outside in the snowy garden. The small wooden birdhouse, now filled with seeds, is gently hanging from a snow-covered branch of a bare winter tree. Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are standing nearby, looking up at the birdhouse with proud smiles. Deep snow covers the ground. The snow-covered house is visible in the background. Gentle winter light. Cartoon style.

In the snowy garden, several small, colorful birds are perched on and around the wooden birdhouse, happily pecking at the seeds inside. Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are observing from a small distance, hidden behind a snowy bush, smiling quietly. The birdhouse is still hanging on the tree. Deep snow covers the ground. Gentle winter light. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are standing closer to the tree in the snowy garden, looking up at the birdhouse which is now surrounded by even more cheerful birds. They are both smiling broadly, happy to see so many birds enjoying the seeds. The scene is filled with a sense of gentle joy. Deep snow covers the ground. Gentle winter light. Cartoon style.

Jänes Sassu and Orav Ossu are standing side-by-side in the snowy garden, giving each other a happy high-five with their tiny paws/hands, beaming with joy and satisfaction. The birdhouse with birds is visible in the background on the tree. Deep snow covers the ground. Gentle winter light. Cartoon style.
